product.name: Espird Chrome Bathroom Vanity Light - 3 Light Bathroom Light Fixture Square Design & UL Certification, Bath Room Lighting Fixtures Over Mirror, Modern Vanity Lighting Fixture for Living Room

The 3 light bathroom vanity light is your best choice and will provide ample lighting for your bathroom, restroom, toilet, living room, bedroom, hallway, cabinet, porch, kitchen, farmhouse and more.

The chrome light fixture bathroom is built with a solid all-metal lamp body, including metal support rings, ensuring durability during transportation, use, and installation. Furthermore, we've enhanced the packaging of the silver bathroom light fixture for bathroom more rigorous to prevent any breakage of the glass covers.

SPECIFICATION & DESCRIPTION: Dimensions of the chrome bathroom light fixture over mirror: L16.93”xW4.8”xH10.04”. Square Glass shades measures: L3.94”x W3.94”x H5.9”. Voltage range：110-120V. Our chrome bathroom lights is compatible with E26 bulbs (MAX60) (not included): LED / CFL / incandescent and vintage filament.

EASY & DUAL INSTALLATION: If you buy our bathroom vanity light over mirror after, you will not only receive a metallic chrome bathroom lighting fixtures over mirror, you will also receive 3 square clear glass shades, in addition to that, we will also give you an instruction manual and to help you install it better. NOTE: If you have trouble with the installation process, we will help you, which you can save on installation costs.

FRIENDLY AFTER SERVICE: We highly value our customers, and your experience is paramount to us. We offer a 3-year guarantee, so if your small vanity lighting fixtures is damaged, please contact us promptly. Sometimes, the clear glass shades of the bathroom lights may break during transportation, but we'll provide a free exchange if you find any breakage.
